# LibreTV GitHub search and migration intake

This patch improves GitHub discovery and migration intake for users coming from the archived upstream `LibreSpark/LibreTV` repository.

## Included

- Adds clearer README search positioning for LibreTV Revival as a maintained self-hosted fork.
- Adds direct GitHub intake links for migration FAQ, Discussions, Issues, and Releases.
- Adds a migration support issue template for users moving from the archived upstream repository.
- Adds a GitHub search and intake runbook for maintainers.
- Keeps the same safety boundary: no public deployment URLs and no public streaming service positioning.

## Links

- Repository: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV>
- Migration FAQ: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV/blob/main/MIGRATION.md>
- Migration discussion: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV/discussions/9>
- Issues: <https://github.com/wxst/LibreTV/issues>
